mood: quiet noise pressed into a severe nocturnal plate
lighting: hard side-raking light with blown white smears against a deep black field, fading into soft optical blur at the edges
object_inventory: one secondary white ink slab split by a central void
small square album apertures along the lower edge
archive-photo corner ticks and caption scars
hairline needle seams and pinhole glints
negative_constraints: no legible words or letterforms inside the finished image
no dashboard, desk, room, shelf, cabinet, studio, or card grid
no literal music gear or realistic prop inventory
no copied logos, page chrome, filenames, or interface labels
protect a large uninterrupted black field
source anchors must appear as marks, cuts, scars, apertures, seams, or glints
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
